---
title: "A Test Post"
description: "A test post for Open Graph metadata."
date: "2026-04-02"
author: "Quarto Tester"
_quarto:
  render-project: true
  tests:
    html:
      ensureFileRegexMatches:
        -
          - '<meta property="og:type" content="article">'
          - '<meta property="og:url" content="https://example.com/posts/a-test-post/">'
        - []
---

This is a test post.
